reports.name: Hittegolven
reports.query:
SELECT * FROM (
    SELECT
        hg.STATION              AS stationsCode,
        st.OMSCHRIJVING         AS station,
        hg.VOLGNR               AS volgnr,
        hg.BEGIN                AS begin,
        hg.EINDE                AS einde,
        hg.DAGEN                AS dagen,
        hg.TROPISCH             AS tropisch,
        hg.TMAX                 AS tmax
    FROM hittegolven hg
    JOIN stations st ON st.CODE = hg.STATION
) _t
WHERE 1=1
<#SELECTIONS>
ORDER BY begin
